readings.citation:
Ps 22:26-27, 28, 30, 31-32, R. v.26a
I will praise you, Lord, in the assembly of your people.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 22:26-27, 28, 30, 31-32, R. v.26a
I will praise you, Lord, in the assembly of your people.

readings.summary: We are in God and God in us.

Remain in me as I remain in you, says the Lord.
Whoever remains in me will bear much fruit.
Jesus the vine, the Father, the vinegrower.

antiphons.text:
O sing a new song to the Lord,
for he has worked wonders;
in the sight of the nations
he has shown his deliverance, alleluia.

I am the true vine and you are the branches, 
Says the Lord. Whoever remains in me,
and I in him, bears fruit in plenty, alleluia.
